source.name: SPY + RSP adjusted-close CSV (operator study)
source.operatorSource: Yahoo Finance v8 chart API adjusted-close operator download through 2026-07-01; transcribed via cap-weight-premium-study
source.note: Reference-aligned v1.9b study output (asOf 2026-07-01). Not a runtime feed; manual transcription from local study JSON.

methodology.inputDescription: Operator-provided SPY and RSP daily CSV with Date and Adj Close columns filtered to Date <= 2026-07-01
methodology.spreadDefinition: SPY total return minus RSP total return over rolling windows
methodology.percentileDefinition: Percentile of current spread or ratio versus aligned history since overlap start

caveats: SPY/RSP proxy for cap-weight premium; does not estimate passive-flow causality and is not a trading signal.
Not an AI-bubble signal; not trading advice or allocation guidance
Adjusted-close data required for production-quality artifact
ETF fees, tracking drift, and RSP quarterly rebalance mechanics add noise
Display-only by default; no Research Composite impact
